positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed mystical mountain range silhouetted against a cosmic nebula sky. The primary colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant magenta, with scattered gold and teal nebula dust. The mountain peaks should be sharply defined, creating a strong, clean silhouette. Use geometric, stylized patterns within the mist and sky to add depth. Cinematic, clean linework, high contrast, vector art aesthetic mixed with ethereal oil painting texture. Optimal for central placement on t-shirts, graphic design, print-ready.
negative: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, text, words, signature, watermark, noise, grain, artifact, asymmetrical, cropped, logos, trademarks, excessive realism, photorealistic, extra limbs
